tools.name: accounts.getApiV1AccountsId
tools.description: GET /api/v1/accounts/{id}

tools.name: accounts.getApiV1AccountsIdFeaturedTags
tools.description: Tags featured by this account.

tools.name: accounts.getApiV1AccountsIdFollowers
tools.description: Accounts which follow the given account, if network is not hidden by the account owner.

tools.name: accounts.getApiV1AccountsIdFollowing
tools.description: Accounts which the given account is following, if network is not hidden by the account owner.

tools.name: accounts.getApiV1AccountsIdIdentityProofs
tools.description: Array of IdentityProof

tools.name: accounts.getApiV1AccountsIdLists
tools.description: User lists that you have added this account to.

tools.name: accounts.getApiV1AccountsIdStatuses
tools.description: Statuses posted to the given account.

tools.name: accounts.getApiV1AccountsRelationships
tools.description: Sets a private note on a user.

tools.name: accounts.getApiV1AccountsSearch
tools.description: Search for matching accounts by username or display name.

tools.name: accounts.getApiV1AccountsVerifyCredentials
tools.description: Test to make sure that the user token works.

tools.name: accounts.patchApiV1AccountsUpdateCredentials
tools.description: Update the user's display and preferences.

tools.name: accounts.postApiV1AccountsIdBlock
tools.description: Block the given account. Clients should filter statuses from this account if received (e.g. due to a boost in the Home timeline).

tools.name: accounts.postApiV1AccountsIdFollow
tools.description: Follow the given account. Can also be used to update whether to show reblogs or enable notifications.

tools.name: accounts.postApiV1AccountsIdMute
tools.description: Mute the given account. Clients should filter statuses and notifications from this account, if received (e.g. due to a boost in the Home timeline).

tools.name: accounts.postApiV1AccountsIdNote
tools.description: Sets a private note on a user.

tools.name: accounts.postApiV1AccountsIdPin
tools.description: Add the given account to the user's featured profiles. (Featured profiles are currently shown on the user's own public profile.)

tools.name: accounts.postApiV1AccountsIdUnblock
tools.description: Block the given account. Clients should filter statuses from this account if received (e.g. due to a boost in the Home timeline).

tools.name: accounts.postApiV1AccountsIdUnfollow
tools.description: Unfollow the given account.

tools.name: accounts.postApiV1AccountsIdUnmute
tools.description: Unmute the given account.

tools.name: accounts.postApiV1AccountsIdUnpin
tools.description: Remove the given account from the user's featured profiles.

tools.name: admin.getApiV1AdminAccounts
tools.description: View accounts matching certain criteria for filtering, up to 100 at a time. Pagination may be done with the HTTP Link header in the response.

tools.name: admin.getApiV1AdminAccountsId
tools.description: View admin-level information about the given account.

tools.name: admin.getApiV1AdminReports
tools.description: View all reports. Pagination may be done with HTTP Link header in the response.

tools.name: admin.getApiV1AdminReportsId
tools.description: View information about the report with the given ID.

tools.name: admin.postApiV1AdminAccountsIdAction
tools.description: Perform an action against an account and log this action in the moderation history.

tools.name: admin.postApiV1AdminAccountsIdApprove
tools.description: Approve the given local account if it is currently pending approval.

tools.name: admin.postApiV1AdminAccountsIdEnable
tools.description: Re-enable a local account whose login is currently disabled.

tools.name: admin.postApiV1AdminAccountsIdReject
tools.description: Reject the given local account if it is currently pending approval.

tools.name: admin.postApiV1AdminAccountsIdUnsilence
tools.description: Unsilence a currently silenced account.

tools.name: admin.postApiV1AdminAccountsIdUnsuspend
tools.description: Unsuspend a currently suspended account.

tools.name: admin.postApiV1AdminReportsIdAssignToSelf
tools.description: Claim the handling of this report to yourself.

tools.name: admin.postApiV1AdminReportsIdReopen
tools.description: Mark a report as resolved with no further action taken.

tools.name: admin.postApiV1AdminReportsIdResolve
tools.description: Mark a report as resolved with no further action taken.

tools.name: admin.postApiV1AdminReportsIdUnassign
tools.description: Unassign a report so that someone else can claim it.

tools.name: announcements.putApiV1AnnouncementsIdReactionsName
tools.description: Allows a user to mark the announcement as read.

tools.name: domainBlocks.postApiV1DomainBlocks
tools.description:
"Block a domain to:
- hide all public posts from it
- hide all notifications from it
- remove all followers from it
- prevent following new users from it (but does not remove existing follows)"

tools.name: oauth.getOauthAuthorize
tools.description: Displays an authorization form to the user. If approved, it will create and return an authorization code, then redirect to the desired redirect_uri, or show the authorization code if urn:ietf:wg:oauth:2.0:oob was requested. The authorization code can be used while requesting a token to obtain access to user-level methods.

tools.name: oauth.postOauthRevoke
tools.description: Revoke an access token to make it no longer valid for use.

tools.name: oauth.postOauthToken
tools.description: Returns an access token, to be used during API calls that are not public.

tools.name: push.deleteApiV1PushSubscription
tools.description: Updates the current push subscription. Only the data part can be updated. To change fundamentals, a new subscription must be created instead.

tools.name: push.getApiV1PushSubscription
tools.description: View the PushSubscription currently associated with this access token.

tools.name: push.postApiV1PushSubscription
tools.description: Add a Web Push API subscription to receive notifications. Each access token can have one push subscription. If you create a new subscription, the old subscription is deleted.

tools.name: push.putApiV1PushSubscription
tools.description: Updates the current push subscription. Only the data part can be updated. To change fundamentals, a new subscription must be created instead.

tools.description: Creates a user and account records. Returns an account access token for the app that initiated the request. The app should save this token for later, and should wait for the user to confirm their account by clicking a link in their email inbox.
